description: US healthcare information exchange and revenue cycle management platform. Connects providers and payers for claims, eligibility, prior authorization, and payment. One of largest health information networks in US.
business_model: B2B - Revenue cycle platform to healthcare providers and payers
key_investors: Humana, Anthem, Blue Cross Blue Shield plans
competitive_advantage: Largest provider-payer network, payer-owned, comprehensive RCM

varden_fit.rationale: Claims infrastructure giant - validates provider-payer connectivity
